# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/vivek/Codes/Qt/ChatServer/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/g++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

ABSL_CFLAGS:INTERNAL=-I/usr/include;-DNOMINMAX
ABSL_CFLAGS_I:INTERNAL=
ABSL_CFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=-DNOMINMAX
ABSL_FOUND:INTERNAL=1
ABSL_INCLUDEDIR:INTERNAL=/usr/include
ABSL_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/include
ABSL_LDFLAGS:INTERNAL=-L/usr/lib;-labsl_strings;-labsl_strings_internal;-labsl_string_view;-labsl_int128;-labsl_base;-lrt;-labsl_spinlock_wait;-labsl_throw_delegate;-labsl_raw_logging_internal;-labsl_log_severity
ABSL_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
ABSL_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=/usr/lib
ABSL_LIBRARIES:INTERNAL=absl_strings;absl_strings_internal;absl_string_view;absl_int128;absl_base;rt;absl_spinlock_wait;absl_throw_delegate;absl_raw_logging_internal;absl_log_severity
ABSL_LIBRARY_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/lib
ABSL_LIBS:INTERNAL=
ABSL_LIBS_L:INTERNAL=
ABSL_LIBS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
ABSL_LIBS_PATHS:INTERNAL=
ABSL_MODULE_NAME:INTERNAL=absl_strings
ABSL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/usr
ABSL_STATIC_CFLAGS:INTERNAL=-I/usr/include;-DNOMINMAX
ABSL_STATIC_CFLAGS_I:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_CFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=-DNOMINMAX
ABSL_STATIC_INCLUDE_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/include
ABSL_STATIC_LDFLAGS:INTERNAL=-L/usr/lib;-labsl_strings;-labsl_strings_internal;-labsl_string_view;-labsl_int128;-labsl_base;-lrt;-labsl_spinlock_wait;-labsl_throw_delegate;-labsl_raw_logging_internal;-labsl_log_severity
ABSL_STATIC_LDFLAGS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_LIBDIR:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_LIBRARIES:INTERNAL=absl_strings;absl_strings_internal;absl_string_view;absl_int128;absl_base;rt;absl_spinlock_wait;absl_throw_delegate;absl_raw_logging_internal;absl_log_severity
ABSL_STATIC_LIBRARY_DIRS:INTERNAL=/usr/lib
ABSL_STATIC_LIBS:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_LIBS_L:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_LIBS_OTHER:INTERNAL=
ABSL_STATIC_LIBS_PATHS:INTERNAL=

ABSL_absl_strings_INCLUDEDIR:INTERNAL=

ABSL_absl_strings_PREFIX:INTERNAL=
ABSL_absl_strings_VERSION:INTERNAL=

CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_AR
CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created

//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=4
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=2
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/ctest

CMAKE_EXECUTABLE_FORMAT:INTERNAL=ELF
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_EXTRA_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=

CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Ninja
//Generator instance identifier.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_INSTANCE:INTERNAL=

CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator toolset.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET:INTERNAL=
//Source directory with the top level CMakeLists.txt file for this
// project
CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/home/vivek/Codes/Qt/ChatServer
//Install .so files without execute permission.
CMAKE_INSTALL_SO_NO_EXE:INTERNAL=0
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_LINKER
CMAKE_LINKER-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of CMakeLists files to read
CMAKE_LIST_FILE_NAME:INTERNAL=CMakeLists.txt
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
